titleStmt.title: SII 36.130: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 130. (A.R. No. 130 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Parākramapāṇḍya. Year 11 and 90th day: A.D. 1155.

summary.p: Tax free gift of the village of Cheṅguḷam Māpiraiyaviṭaṅkanallūr to the temple of Mūlasthāṉamuḍaiya Mahādēva at the request of the saint Chēramāṉ Tōḻaṉ by the king. The order of the king was issued when he was seated on his throne Isaiyaḷavukaṇḍāṉ in the hall Māṇābaraṇaṉ in his palace at Madurai. Signatures of officers of the Revenue (Puravuvari) department are affixed at the end of the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ puṇarap pūmakaḷ viḷaṅka vikkirama jayamakaḷ poṟpuyat tiruppak kaṉaka meru
viṟ kaiyal viḷaiyāṭa Irunilattoru taṉi veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa tirumaṇi muṭi taṉ Urimaiyiṟ cūṭiyu
laku nīṅki Oru kollocci vañci maṉṉa(r)rum vaṭapula ventarum Añci vantiṟaiñci Aṭimalar cūṭa
maṉṉiya vīrasimhāsaṉattu Ulakumuḻutuṭaiyār Uṭaṉ vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikulam viḷa
kkiya komutal komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī parākkrama pāṇṭiya tevar mā
ṭakkuḷakkīḻ maturaik koyilluḷḷālai māṉāparaṇaṉ kūṭam Icaiyaḷavu kaṇṭāṉil paḷḷika
Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu yāṇṭu patiṉoṉṟāvatu nāḷ 9 10 teṉ kallaka nāṭ
ṭu ce kkaḷḷūr śrī mūlattāṉamuṭaiya mahātevar toṇṭakaḷum śrī māheśvara
kkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻin taruḷiṉapaṭi tapayaril ceramāntoḻaṉ namakku
coṉṉamaiyil Ittevar tirunāmattāl vilai koṇṭuṭaiya teṉkallaka nāṭṭuc ceṅkuḷamā
piraiyaviṭaṅka nallūr perunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam śrī mūlasthānamuṭaiya mahātevaṟkku kā
rāṇmai mītāṭci Uḷppaṭa muṉṉuṭaiyāṉ m peraiyumāy varukiṟamai tavittu ve
vikkiramacoḻa purattu nakarattārkku Iṟuttu varum Oṭṭiṉpaṭi tiramam nāṟpatu
tavatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākkik kaikkoṇṭu cempilum kallilum veṭṭik koḷka veṉṟu ti
moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai kīḻiraṇiyamuṭṭattu teṉṉavaṉ kaṇakkaṅkuṭi Iṭaiyāṟṟu śrī [pa ]
caṭaiyan taṇṇāla tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāṉa Īḻattaraiyar Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari nāyakam kuḷattūrā
n Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvarināyakam veḷḷūruṭaiyāṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari ṉāyakam kāraikiḻāṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai kkirama yāṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śrī vallavattarai
taraṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ka ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai teṉṉavaṉ Eḻuttu Eḻuttu Ivai
k kūṟṟattu kīḻkūṟṟu koyillūruṭaiyān Araiyan nīṟaṇintāṉā vaiyātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuḷattū
ruṭaiyān kāḷi karuṇākaraṉāṉa mīṉavaṉ mūventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
